properties.name: forge.auth.enable-api-permission
properties.description: 是否启用API接口权限校验

properties.name: forge.auth.api-permission-exclude-paths
properties.description: API权限校验排除路径（支持通配符）

properties.name: forge.auth.enable-login-lock
properties.description: 是否启用登录失败锁定功能

properties.name: forge.auth.max-login-attempts
properties.description: 最大登录失败尝试次数

properties.name: forge.auth.fail-record-expire
properties.description: 登录失败记录保留时长（分钟）

properties.name: forge.auth.same-account-login-strategy
properties.description: 同一账号登录策略: allow_concurrent(允许并发), replace_old(新登录踢出旧登录), reject_new(拒绝新登录)

properties.name: forge.auth.enable-online-user-management
properties.description: 是否启用在线用户管理
